modelName: HKJC Pure Data Advanced Racing Model
purpose: Estimate each declared runner's winning probability from racing data only.

dataPolicy.oddsUsage: Current odds and pool investment are excluded from modelProbability. They may only be used in a separate value-bet comparison layer after probabilities are produced.
dataPolicy.historicalOddsUsage: Historical win odds from past horse records are treated as one signal inside historical performance quality, not as current market influence.

features.description: Weighted recent historical performance from the horse profile.
Racecard last-six-runs form, with stronger weight on the most recent starts.
Performance on same venue and near the same distance.
Performance in the same race class.
Relative current official rating inside the race.
Barrier draw advantage by venue and distance.
Relative handicap weight advantage inside the race.
Days since last run and expected race fitness.
Current body weight stability versus recent body weights.

penalties.description: Penalty for declared-starter veterinary or incident records.

optionalValueLayer.note: Use this only after prediction to identify value. Do not feed edge back into the ranking model.
